_comment: Curated family activities near Westfield, NJ (07090). Shape is intentionally stable so a live source (events API / serverless proxy) can map into the same fields later. Ratings are 0-3. ageSuitability: how well it fits each kid. activeRating: room to run around (for the 5yo). napFriendly: quiet/shaded/stroller-nap suitability (for the 2yo). Hours are approximate - confirm before relying on them.

activities.name: Mindowaskin Park
activities.notes: Pond, shaded paths and benches in the heart of town. Calm enough for a stroller nap; gentle space for the toddler.

activities.name: Tamaques Park
activities.notes: Large park with a big playground and open fields - lots of room for the 5yo to run. Quiet wooded edges work for a nap.

activities.name: Echo Lake Park
activities.notes: Lake loop with shaded paths - one of the best quiet outdoor nap spots nearby. Easy stroller walking.

activities.name: Trailside Nature & Science Center
activities.notes: Indoor nature exhibits plus Watchung Reservation trails right outside. Great rainy-day backup that still engages both kids.

activities.name: Watchung Reservation Trails
activities.notes: Wooded hiking trails - excellent for an energetic 5yo. Stroller-limited, so carry the toddler; shaded and quiet.

activities.name: Nomahegan Park
activities.notes: Flat paved loop around a pond - great for scooters/bikes for the 5yo and an easy stroller nap lap.

activities.name: Turtle Back Zoo
activities.notes: A bigger ~20 min outing both kids love. Stroller-friendly; toddler can nap in the stroller on the move.

activities.name: Indoor Kids' Play Gym
activities.notes: Climb-and-run indoor play - a strong rainy-day Plan B for the 5yo's energy. Confirm a specific venue/hours.

activities.name: Westfield Memorial Library - Kids' Room
activities.notes: Quiet indoor option with a children's room and weekend storytimes. Calm enough to settle the toddler. Check storytime schedule.

activities.name: Downtown Westfield Stroll
activities.notes: Walkable shops and cafes - an easy stroller-nap loop with a coffee stop while the toddler dozes.

activities.name: Liberty Science Center

location.address: 222 Jersey City Blvd, Jersey City, NJ

activities.notes: Large indoor science museum (~30 min) - a great all-weather day for the 5yo. Toddler can stroller-nap between exhibits.

activities.name: Backyard / Home Quiet Time
activities.notes: Fallback for severe weather: quiet nap at home for the toddler with indoor play for the 5yo.
